ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Player number assigned to the player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., F, D, G) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that drafted the player */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started as a rookie */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent representing the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "player_value" INTEGER /* Value of the player to the team */,
  "player_rating" REAL /* Player rating (e.g., overall skill level) */,
  "goalie_type" TEXT /* Type of goalie (e.g., starter, backup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "general_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the general manager of the team */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Value of the team (e.g., estimated worth) */,
  "team_budget" REAL /* Budget of the team (e.g., for salaries, expenses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_general_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("general_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the league */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commissioner of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points (goals + assists) */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken */,
  "shooting_percentage" REAL /* Shooting percentage */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff losses */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Average time on ice per game */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals */,
  "game_tying_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-tying goals */,
  "overtime_goals" INTEGER /* Number of overtime goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, general manager, player, fan) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., game, practice, travel) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the event */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "rehab_progress" TEXT /* Rehabilitation progress (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus_terms" TEXT /* Bonus terms and conditions */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, renegotiating) */,
  "buyout_amount" REAL /* Buyout amount for the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fan's favorite team */,
  "favorite_player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fan's favorite player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_favorite_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_favorite_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the ticket */,
  "row_number" TEXT /* Row number of the ticket */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "sold_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., available, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES schedules ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchandise" (
  "merchandise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchandise item */,
  "merchandise_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchandise item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the merchandise item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the merchandise item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the merchandise item (e.g., jersey, hat) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchandise_id")
)
